title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Optimization Algorithms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: LAMB / DAdapt (LR-Free)
steps.summary: LAMB / DAdapt (LR-Free) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Advanced Architectures. Start after DAdapt and LAMB.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: DAdapt
steps.summary: DAdapt belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with LAMB / DAdapt (LR-Free) and Ratio Variable. It opens into LAMB / DAdapt (LR-Free).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Dynamic PSO
steps.summary: Dynamic PSO belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Advanced Architectures. Start after Dynamic Network Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Cramér-Rao Lower Bound
steps.summary: Cramér-Rao Lower Bound belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Advanced Architectures. Start after Cramér-Rao Bound.

steps.title: Ratio Variable
steps.summary: Ratio Variable belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Dynamic PSO and DAdapt.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
